reviews.quote: The birthday cake I ordered was absolutely stunning and tasted even better than it looked. My daughter was thrilled!
reviews.author: Sarah M.

reviews.quote: I stop in every Tuesday for a croissant and lavender latte. Best bakery in Maplewood, hands down.
reviews.author: James T.

reviews.quote: Their sourdough bread is the real deal. I haven't bought bread from the grocery store since I discovered SweetCrumbs.
reviews.author: Linda R.

faqs.question: Do you offer vegan or gluten-free options?
faqs.answer: We have a rotating selection of vegan cookies and gluten-free brownies available daily. Just ask our staff what's fresh today!

faqs.question: How early should I order a custom cake?
faqs.answer: We recommend placing custom orders at least 1 week in advance. For weddings or large events, 1 month is preferred.

faqs.question: Do you take pre-orders for holiday treats?
faqs.answer: Yes, we open holiday pre-orders on our website two weeks before major holidays. Keep an eye on our homepage for updates.

faqs.question: Are your ingredients locally sourced?
faqs.answer: Whenever possible! We source our dairy and seasonal fruits from local farms within the tristate area.
